name: GPT Live 1 Mini
description: GPT Live 1 Mini is OpenAI's smaller GPT-Live voice model for ChatGPT Voice, designed for continuous bidirectional audio conversations with lower-cost default availability for Free users.

details.name: source_status
details.value: OpenAI announced GPT-Live-1 mini on July 8, 2026 for ChatGPT Voice. API availability is planned soon but no stable API model documentation or pricing is published yet.

details.name: chatgpt_availability
details.value: Rolling out globally across iOS, Android, and ChatGPT.com. GPT-Live-1 mini is the default ChatGPT Voice model for Free users.

details.name: api_availability
details.value: OpenAI says API support is planned soon; provider model ID, pricing, and gateway availability are not confirmed.

details.name: background_model
details.value: GPT-Live-1 mini uses GPT-5.5 Instant in the background.

details.name: reported_capabilities
details.value: Full-duplex continuous interaction, interruption handling, better listening during pauses and background noise, live translation, visual answer cards, and delegation to frontier models for search or deeper reasoning.

page_notice.markdown: GPT Live 1 Mini is available in ChatGPT Voice for Free users. OpenAI says API support is planned soon, but has not confirmed a stable API model ID, pricing, or AI Stats Gateway availability.
